title: Plan: decompose an ambiguous initiative
task: Break an ambiguous quarterly initiative ('reduce checkout abandonment') into PR-sized leaf tasks with explicit critical path, owners, and out-of-scope items.
baseline_prompt: Break down the initiative 'reduce checkout abandonment by 20% this quarter' into engineering work. List concrete tasks, dependencies, and the critical path.
polymath_prompt: Use Polymath planning + thinking to decompose 'reduce checkout abandonment by 20% this quarter'. Apply work-breakdown, surface the critical path, name explicit out-of-scope items, and tag each leaf with a t-shirt estimate.
